sub_mechanisms: M_1: define evaluation category with LLMs as objects
M_2: rubric criteria as representable functors
stripped_llm_application: Treat each LLM as object in an evaluation category; rubric criteria as morphisms-out; the full evaluation = collection of responses across rubrics, sufficient to determine the LLM up to behavioral equivalence.
novelty_claim_stripped: LLM-as-judge rubric eval (RULERS, LLM-Rubric, etc.) treat rubrics as criteria; this candidate uses CATEGORICAL representable-functor framework giving uniqueness via Yoneda.
